chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-816 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2022. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Syed Ghulam Hyder Shah, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant P.G. Complainant is present in person. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J- Allegations against applicant and other accused named in FIR leveled by complainant, who is a practicing Advocate, are that on account of some family dispute they entered his house on 13.05.2022 at 11:00 p.m., injured him with knife, looted some articles from his home and left. 2. Learned Defence Counsel has submitted an order in respect of co-accused Saima Javed W/o brother of complainant, whose bail has been confirmed on the basis of compromise. Complainant is present and has given no objection stating that since accused party is related to them, they have pardoned them. Learned A.P.G has also given no objection. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed and ad- interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 3. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Shahid
